things.name: Warsaw Old Town (Stare Miasto)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage completely rebuilt medieval old town — reconstructed brick by brick after WWII

things.name: POLIN Museum of the History of Polish Jews
things.description: Award-winning museum of 1,000 years of Jewish life in Poland — Europe's most important Jewish museum

things.name: Palace of Culture and Science
things.description: Stalin's 1955 gift to Poland — observation deck on the 30th floor with panoramic views of the city

things.name: Warsaw Rising Museum
things.description: Powerful multi-media museum commemorating the 1944 Warsaw Uprising against German occupation

things.name: Royal Castle
things.description: Former residence of Polish kings and presidents — rebuilt after WWII destruction, now a national museum

things.name: Lazienki Royal Baths Park
things.description: Beautiful 18th-century park with the Palace on the Isle and free Chopin concerts in summer

things.name: Chopin Museum
things.description: Interactive museum in the Ostrogski Palace devoted to Poland's most beloved composer

things.name: Wilanow Palace
things.description: The Polish Versailles — magnificent baroque royal residence with formal gardens and a museum of posters

things.name: Praga District
things.description: Warsaw's raw, arty east bank district with street art, vodka bars, vintage markets and Soviet architecture

things.name: National Museum
things.description: Poland's largest art museum with ancient, medieval and Polish art including the famous Faras Gallery
